## MS-ISR Log Source Validation — Authority to Operate (ATO) Preparation

**Purpose:**  
This workbook validates that Azure resources are sending diagnostic logs to the Sentinel workspace as required by the MS-ISR baseline configuration. It provides visibility into **70 log sources** across **22 Azure workloads**, each mapped to applicable **NIST SP 800-53 Rev 4** control families including Audit & Accountability (AU), Access Control (AC), Configuration Management (CM), and others.

**NIST Alignment:**  
The log sources validated here support control objectives in the AU (Audit and Accountability) family, including AU-2 (Event Logging), AU-3 (Content of Audit Records), AU-6 (Audit Review, Analysis, and Reporting), and AU-12 (Audit Record Generation). Consistent log ingestion is foundational to demonstrating continuous monitoring capabilities required for ATO.

> ⚠️ **Disclaimer:** This workbook is an *operational aid* for validating log ingestion status. It does **not** replace your security assessment, System Security Plan (SSP), or formal ATO package requirements. Use the results here to identify gaps, then work with your assessor to document control implementations appropriately.

---

### How to Use This Workbook

1. **Set your scope** — Select your Subscription(s) and Log Analytics Workspace from the dropdowns
2. **Choose a time range** — 14 days is recommended; shorter ranges may miss low-volume tables
3. **Review the bar chart** — See at a glance which workloads are fully ingesting vs. have gaps
4. **Expand the table** — Click a workload row to see individual log sources and their status
5. **View sample data** — Click any table row to load sample records in the panel below
6. **Investigate findings** — Any row showing ❌ **Not Configured** needs diagnostic settings enabled
7. **Click the Docs link** — Each row includes a link to Microsoft Learn for enabling that log source
8. **Export evidence** — Use the Excel export to document your validation results

---

| Status | Audit Result | Meaning | Action Required |
|--------|-------------|---------|----------------|
| ✅ **Ingesting** | Pass | Data actively flowing | None — logging operational |
| ⚠️ **Configured** | Review | Table exists, no events in time range | Verify log ingestion is active |
| ❌ **Not Configured** | Finding | Table not in workspace schema | Enable diagnostic settings for this resource |

parameters.name: SelectedSubscription
parameters.label: Subscription
parameters.description: Select the Azure subscription(s) containing your Sentinel workspace

parameters.name: Workspace
parameters.label: Log Analytics Workspace
parameters.description: Select the Log Analytics workspace(s) where Sentinel diagnostic logs are ingested

parameters.name: TimeRange
parameters.label: Time Range
parameters.description: How far back to check for log activity — longer ranges reduce false negatives for low-volume tables
parameters.jsonData: [{"value": "1d", "label": "Last 1 day"}, {"value": "3d", "label": "Last 3 days"}, {"value": "7d", "label": "Last 7 days"}, {"value": "14d", "label": "Last 14 days", "selected": true}, {"value": "30d", "label": "Last 30 days"}, {"value": "90d", "label": "Last 90 days"}]

parameters.name: SelectedComponent
parameters.label: Workload
parameters.description: Filter by Azure service workload (e.g. Entra ID, Azure Firewall, AVD). 'All' shows all 22 workloads.
parameters.jsonData: [{"value": "All", "label": "All", "selected": true}, {"value": "Entra ID", "label": "Entra ID"}, {"value": "Azure Activity", "label": "Azure Activity"}, {"value": "Azure Automation Account", "label": "Azure Automation Account"}, {"value": "Azure Container Registry", "label": "Azure Container Registry"}, {"value": "Azure Data Transfer", "label": "Azure Data Transfer"}, {"value": "Azure Kubernetes Service", "label": "Azure Kubernetes Service"}, {"value": "Azure API Management", "label": "Azure API Management"}, {"value": "AVD AppGroup", "label": "AVD AppGroup"}, {"value": "Azure Application Gateway", "label": "Azure Application Gateway"}, {"value": "Azure Firewall", "label": "Azure Firewall"}, {"value": "Azure Virtual Desktop", "label": "Azure Virtual Desktop"}, {"value": "AVD Workspace", "label": "AVD Workspace"}, {"value": "Azure Key Vault", "label": "Azure Key Vault"}, {"value": "Azure Load Balancer", "label": "Azure Load Balancer"}, {"value": "Log Analytics Workspace", "label": "Log Analytics Workspace"}, {"value": "Network Interface", "label": "Network Interface"}, {"value": "Network Security Group", "label": "Network Security Group"}, {"value": "Public IP Address", "label": "Public IP Address"}, {"value": "Azure Recovery Services Vault", "label": "Azure Recovery Services Vault"}, {"value": "Azure Cognitive Search", "label": "Azure Cognitive Search"}, {"value": "Virtual Network Gateway", "label": "Virtual Network Gateway"}, {"value": "VNET Flow Logs", "label": "VNET Flow Logs"}]

parameters.name: SelectedFamily
parameters.label: Control Family
parameters.description: Filter by NIST 800-53 control family — shows only log sources mapped to that family
parameters.jsonData: [{"value": "All", "label": "All", "selected": true}, {"value": "AC", "label": "AC - Access Control"}, {"value": "AU", "label": "AU - Audit & Accountability"}, {"value": "CM", "label": "CM - Configuration Management"}, {"value": "CP", "label": "CP - Contingency Planning"}, {"value": "IA", "label": "IA - Identification & Authentication"}, {"value": "IR", "label": "IR - Incident Response"}, {"value": "RA", "label": "RA - Risk Assessment"}, {"value": "SC", "label": "SC - System & Communications Protection"}, {"value": "SI", "label": "SI - System & Information Integrity"}]

parameters.name: SelectedTableFilter
parameters.label: Table
parameters.description: Filter by Sentinel table name. 'All' shows all tables.

parameters.name: SelectedStatus
parameters.label: Status
parameters.description: Filter by configuration state: Ingesting (data flowing), Configured (enabled but no activity), or Not Configured (needs setup)

parameters.name: SelectedATOStatus
parameters.label: Audit Result
parameters.description: Audit result — Pass (Ingesting), Review (Configured but no data), or Finding (Not Configured). Use Review + Finding to see everything needing attention.

Expected
| join kind=leftouter (DataCheck) on CheckId
| extend TableInSchema = SentinelTable in (SchemaCheck)
| extend ConfigStatus = case(
    isnotnull(Last), 'Ingesting',
    TableInSchema, 'Configured - No Activity',
    'Not Configured')
| extend ATOStatus = case(ConfigStatus == 'Not Configured', 'Finding', ConfigStatus == 'Configured - No Activity', 'Review', 'Pass')
| extend LastSeen = case(
    isnotnull(Last), format_datetime(Last, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'),
    TableInSchema, 'schema only, no data in range',
    'not in workspace')
| extend ActualTable = case(isnotempty(DataSrc), DataSrc, SentinelTable)
| extend Source = case(
    isnotempty(SourceSub), SourceSub,
    'No Data')
| where '{SelectedComponent}' == 'All' or Workload == '{SelectedComponent}'
| where '{SelectedFamily}' == 'All' or Controls has '{SelectedFamily}'
| where '{SelectedTableFilter}' == 'All' or SentinelTable == '{SelectedTableFilter}'
| where '{SelectedStatus}' == 'All' or ConfigStatus has '{SelectedStatus}'
| where '{SelectedATOStatus}' == 'All' or ATOStatus == '{SelectedATOStatus}'
| extend _fam = strcat(
    iff(Controls has 'AC-', 'AC (Access Control), ', ''),
    iff(Controls has 'AU-', 'AU (Audit), ', ''),
    iff(Controls has 'CM-', 'CM (Config Mgmt), ', ''),
    iff(Controls has 'CP-', 'CP (Contingency), ', ''),
    iff(Controls has 'IA-', 'IA (Auth), ', ''),
    iff(Controls has 'IR-', 'IR (Incident Response), ', ''),
    iff(Controls has 'RA-', 'RA (Risk), ', ''),
    iff(Controls has 'SC-', 'SC (System & Comms), ', ''),
    iff(Controls has 'SI-', 'SI (Integrity), ', ''))
| extend ['Controls'] = trim_end(', ', _fam)
| extend _sortOrder = case(Workload == 'Entra ID', 0, Workload == 'Azure Activity', 1, Workload == 'Azure Automation Account', 2, Workload == 'Azure Container Registry', 3, Workload == 'Azure Data Transfer', 4, Workload == 'Azure Kubernetes Service', 5, Workload == 'Azure API Management', 6, Workload == 'AVD AppGroup', 7, Workload == 'Azure Application Gateway', 8, Workload == 'Azure Firewall', 9, Workload == 'Azure Virtual Desktop', 10, Workload == 'AVD Workspace', 11, Workload == 'Azure Key Vault', 12, Workload == 'Azure Load Balancer', 13, Workload == 'Log Analytics Workspace', 14, Workload == 'Network Interface', 15, Workload == 'Network Security Group', 16, Workload == 'Public IP Address', 17, Workload == 'Azure Recovery Services Vault', 18, Workload == 'Azure Cognitive Search', 19, Workload == 'Virtual Network Gateway', 20, Workload == 'VNET Flow Logs', 21, 99)
| extend _sort = case(ConfigStatus has 'Not', 0, ConfigStatus has 'Configured', 1, 2)
| sort by _sortOrder asc, _sort asc, DisplayName asc
| project Workload, Source, ['Table']=ActualTable, ['Configuration Status']=ConfigStatus, ['Audit Result']=ATOStatus, ['Last Record']=LastSeen, ['Controls'], ['Enable']=EnableLink, ResourceFilter

let _raw = materialize(
    {SelectedTable}
    | where '{SelectedResourceFilter}' == '' or column_ifexists('ResourceType', '') == '{SelectedResourceFilter}' or column_ifexists('ResourceId', '') contains '/{SelectedResourceFilter}/'
    | where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange})
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by _binT=bin(TimeGenerated, 1m), _actor=coalesce(
        column_ifexists('UserPrincipalName', ''),
        column_ifexists('Caller', ''),
        column_ifexists('Identity', ''),
        column_ifexists('UserName', ''),
        column_ifexists('Account', ''),
        column_ifexists('AADEmail', ''),
        tostring(column_ifexists('_ResourceId', '')))
    | project-away _binT, _actor
    | top 50 by TimeGenerated desc
    | extend _initBy = tostring(column_ifexists('InitiatedBy', ''))
    | extend _extProps = tostring(column_ifexists('ExtendedProperties', ''))
    | extend Actor = case(
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('UserPrincipalName', '')), tostring(column_ifexists('UserPrincipalName', '')),
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('Caller', '')), tostring(column_ifexists('Caller', '')),
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('Identity', '')), tostring(column_ifexists('Identity', '')),
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('UserName', '')), tostring(column_ifexists('UserName', '')),
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('Account', '')), tostring(column_ifexists('Account', '')),
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('AADEmail', '')), tostring(column_ifexists('AADEmail', '')),
        _initBy !in ('', '{}') and isnotempty(tostring(parse_json(_initBy).user.userPrincipalName)), tostring(parse_json(_initBy).user.userPrincipalName),
        _initBy !in ('', '{}') and isnotempty(tostring(parse_json(_initBy).app.displayName)), tostring(parse_json(_initBy).app.displayName),
        _initBy !in ('', '{}'), _initBy,
        isnotempty(tostring(parse_json(_extProps).CallerName)), tostring(parse_json(_extProps).CallerName),
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('SourceIp', '')), tostring(column_ifexists('SourceIp', '')),
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('SourceIP', '')), tostring(column_ifexists('SourceIP', '')),
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('CallerIpAddress', '')), tostring(column_ifexists('CallerIpAddress', '')),
        isnotempty(tostring(column_ifexists('_ResourceId', ''))), tostring(column_ifexists('_ResourceId', '')),
        'System'
    )
    | extend ActorType = case(
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('UserPrincipalName', '')), 'User',
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('Caller', '')) and tostring(column_ifexists('Caller', '')) contains '@', 'User',
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('Caller', '')), 'Service Principal',
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('Identity', '')) and tostring(column_ifexists('Identity', '')) contains '@', 'User',
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('Identity', '')), 'Service Principal',
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('UserName', '')), 'User',
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('Account', '')), 'User',
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('AADEmail', '')), 'User',
        _initBy !in ('', '{}') and isnotempty(tostring(parse_json(_initBy).user.userPrincipalName)), 'User',
        _initBy !in ('', '{}') and isnotempty(tostring(parse_json(_initBy).app.displayName)), 'Service Principal',
        _initBy !in ('', '{}'), 'Unknown',
        isnotempty(tostring(parse_json(_extProps).CallerName)), 'Service Principal',
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('SourceIp', '')), 'System',
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('SourceIP', '')), 'System',
        isnotempty(column_ifexists('CallerIpAddress', '')), 'System',
        isnotempty(tostring(column_ifexists('_ResourceId', ''))), 'System',
        'System'
    )
    | project-reorder Actor, ActorType, TimeGenerated
    | project-away _initBy, _extProps
);
let _guids = _raw | where Actor matches regex '^[0-9a-fA-F]{8}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{12}$' | distinct Actor;
let _guidLookup = union isfuzzy=true
    (SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago(90d) | where tostring(UserId) in (_guids) | summarize DisplayName=take_any(UserPrincipalName), LookupType='User' by ActorId=tostring(UserId)),
    (AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago(90d) | where tostring(ServicePrincipalId) in (_guids) | summarize DisplayName=take_any(ServicePrincipalName), LookupType='Service Principal' by ActorId=tostring(ServicePrincipalId)),
    (AADManagedIdentitySignInLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago(90d) | where tostring(ServicePrincipalId) in (_guids) | summarize DisplayName=take_any(ServicePrincipalName), LookupType='Managed Identity' by ActorId=tostring(ServicePrincipalId))
| summarize DisplayName=take_any(DisplayName), LookupType=take_any(LookupType) by ActorId;
let _authRoleLookup = _raw
| where Actor in (_guids)
| extend _r = tostring(parse_json(tostring(column_ifexists('Authorization_d', ''))).evidence.role)
| where isnotempty(_r)
| summarize RoleName=take_any(_r) by ActorId=Actor;
let _allLookup = _guidLookup
| join kind=fullouter (_authRoleLookup) on ActorId
| extend DisplayName = coalesce(DisplayName, RoleName)
| project ActorId=coalesce(ActorId, ActorId1), DisplayName, LookupType;
_raw
| join kind=leftouter (_allLookup) on $left.Actor == $right.ActorId
| extend Actor = iff(isnotempty(DisplayName) and DisplayName != Actor, strcat(DisplayName, ' (', Actor, ')'), Actor)
| extend ActorType = iff(isnotempty(LookupType), LookupType, ActorType)
| project-away ActorId, DisplayName, LookupType
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
